DTR  |  Listen to a Short Exchange
LSE-HS11-L4-300650-HSELA1112-HJD-IFN-01 • HS English 11-12 • Citing Strong and Thorough Textual Evidence

The Garrison Ledger

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Write three things: what the entry establishes, what it leaves uncertain, and what the teacher's lesson is about.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RI.11-12.1  |  HS English 11-12: Citing Strong and Thorough Textual Evidence
